suggestions.reason: The link in the source is an absolute external URL to the documentation site. The candidate incorrectly changed it to a relative path which will result in a 404.

rationale: The translation is technically sound and captures Dan's direct, punchy style well. It correctly preserves the MDX structure and code blocks. The only high-priority fix is reverting an incorrect relative link transformation on an external documentation URL.
